content: I'm an Analytics Engineer and Data Engineer with 4+ years building modern data platforms, analytics solutions, and cloud-based data pipelines. I design scalable staging, intermediate, and mart-layer dbt models, dimensional data models, and analytics-ready datasets that support executive reporting, financial analytics, and self-service BI.

I work across the modern data stack with dbt, Snowflake, Python, SQL, and Airflow, plus Spark, Kafka, and Databricks for big data, on AWS and Azure. I care about data warehousing, data governance, and data quality, building automated testing, reconciliation, and lineage frameworks so the data downstream teams depend on stays trusted and well documented.

highlights.title: Analytics Engineering
highlights.description: dbt models, dimensional modeling, star schema, and data marts with lineage and documentation.

highlights.title: Data Engineering
highlights.description: Scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, Change Data Capture, and batch processing with Python and PySpark.

highlights.title: Big Data & Cloud
highlights.description: Apache Spark, Kafka, and Databricks on AWS and Azure for high-volume data processing.

highlights.title: Data Quality & Governance
highlights.description: Automated testing, reconciliation, validation, and lineage that keep business-critical data trusted.
